name: Potassium
summary: Decision-ready summary: Potassium is best framed for potassium deficiency; blood pressure support; electrolyte balance; safety screen: kidney disease; ACE inhibitors/ARBs; potassium-sparing diuretics.

dosage: Adequate intake: 3400 mg/day adult men, 2600 mg/day adult women; potassium supplements are usually low-dose unless prescribed
